description_long: This is a complete drum kit featuring a vibrant yellow finish on the shells, consisting of a bass drum, two mounted toms, a floor tom, a snare drum, and three cymbals including a hi-hat, crash, and ride. The drums are supported by chrome-plated metal stands and hardware, with the cymbals mounted on adjustable stands. The kit includes a black padded drum throne for seating. The drumheads are white and appear to be made of synthetic material, while the rims and lugs are metallic. The hi-hat pedal and bass drum pedal are visible, indicating full playability. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, suitable for both performance and practice in urban environments.
description: A yellow drum kit with chrome hardware, three cymbals, and a black drum throne, all in excellent condition. The set includes multiple drums and stands, giving it a professional and visually striking look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full drum kit layout, with all drums, cymbals, and the drum throne clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left angled view highlighting the side of the bass drum, the hi-hat stand, and the depth of the toms.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the drum throne, the backs of the toms, and the arrangement of the cymbals.
description_view_3: Right angled view showing the side of the bass drum, the floor tom, and the ride cymbal stand.
